TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: U micidekay a demak nu Cengkuwangaw U demak nu Cengkuwangaw malesitudung tu Madawdaw. Na nikuwantu i kaRipunan ku sawaliyan nu Taywan, mamelaw nu heni kira Pangcah atu ruma a payniyaru'an, sadihemay saan caay kariang, sisa pakadademakan tu pihacengay a demakan, matiya misalalani', misakayakay, misatimu, misapungkang, misaminatu, mikilang, mibekeluh, misaluma… adihay ku sasanga'an, awaay ku paherekan. Matiya i 1904 nu mihecaan, maherek kira rarayaay a lalan, namaka Puyuma tangasay Kudic nu Bakung, makalat tu pitu a pulu' ira ku siwa ku nikararaya nisanga' tira lalan. I 1909 nu mihecaan, malingtu a misanga tu lalan nu silamalay tangasa i 1911 a mihecaan tiya maherek. Na makara i minatu nu Nabakuwan tangasa i Puyuma nu Pusung atu dengayay a kayraan nu silamalay a lalalalanan. Tuna mahaen saupu han tu nira Ripun ku kapah amin a papisikak, araw maburibur tu waca ku 'urip nu niyaru', micidek ku wayway, sacudacuday hank u niyaru a papitupin tu tamdaw nu heni a talacuwacuwa, adihayadihay tu ku cingelaway, caayay pakadungdung tu demak nira Ripun, haen satu a malalais i 1908 nu mihecaan, ta masadak ku saayaway nu la'is nu Cikasuan i niyaru' nu Pangcah. I kaRipunan nu 1910 nu mihecaan, i sakatusa a bulad nu tusa a pulu'ira ku lima a remiad, ira ku nilubang nu kantu nu Ripun tu "lima a miheca tu sapilesimet tu bansing"sanay a lubang, tu sapieping tu itiniay a Yincumin patahekal satu mamikisa tu lalalalanan, tangasa sa i limaay a bulad tu sabaw enem,lubang sat u sakay umah,mahaen tu sapialaw tu sera nu Yincumin, a mipekpek tu sapitengilaw tu suwal nu Ripun. Tangasa i 1911 nu miheca i limaay a bulad, i herek a palipida kira Ripun, masasuwal tu kira tumuk amin a malecapu i Pisirian a masasuwal a milubang tu sapibelihaw tira Ripunan, atu nikelul tu lipida, nirawacu atu nialaw tu kuwakuwang, mahaen ku ringes atu sakangalayaw a mibahbah tu Ripun. Sulinay i tiyatu nu mihecaan herek nu lisin, caay yamin piculu tu nitipus a pateli i suku nira Ripun, araw kabana'an, belut satu kira sakakaay a miruyaruy a tayra i Madawdaw atu tulik a paremiad a papiculu', padudu satu papasuwalen nira Ripun ci Kolas Mahengheng a misasa'a miherek tinademakan, ta caay tu piliclic kira Ripun. I tiya:tu a mihecaan tu pituay a bulad nu tusa a pulu' ira ku sepat, ira ku kincal nu Tulik ci 福間彥四郎 palecapu tu tumuk nu niyaru' a micihi a miliclic tira ni sangaan a lalan, araw macacihi atu tumun nu Tulic ciRaoron, makamelaw kira sakakaay a tumuk nu Tulik araw belung satu amin kira tumuk nu niyaru'a mipekpek ta mapatay kira kincal a sidemak tira "Cengkuwangaw hanay a demak". Makatengil kira tumuk nu Madawdaw, kerid satu tu binawlan a micalap tu tayritayringan atu cacudadan, pacuk han kira kincal atu pasubana'ay. Tuwa pasaupu han nira ku niyaru' nu Madawdaw, Cirarukuhay, Kaheciday, Turik, Paung^ung, makala tu tuluay a patekenan nu kapah a mikukung tira kalecapuan atu lalubangan, araw malalitemuh i Kanapuka atiya kincal nu Ripun a maletaes, mapatay kiya tatusaay a kincal, maduka ku madukaay, makamelaw kiya i amisay a kincal belung han kira Pangcah milaliw, tuna mahaen papaya satu a micumud tu luma' nu Ripun a mitakaw amipeci tu maamaan tu sapiedis tira Ripunan. Milaliwmilaliw tu kuheni i Kinapuka. I sangsangdeb nu enemay ku tuki, makatengil tu kira i Babukuday a kincal putun han ku makaamisay a sakasasuwal a telay, maletep henaca ku lelesian nu Puyuma, maputun ku lalan, sabaw enem tu kira kincal u mamikinsa a tayra i Babukud, iterung nu lalan malitemuh nu heni kira caayay katatanu kincal atu pasubana'ay nu Madawdaw a mapasubana'a mitungal tu tayraaya tamdaw. I tuya tusaay a pulu'ira ku walu a remiad, maaununtu a palecapu tu hitay kira Ripun, tu sakacaay tu pakacumut kira Pangcah, padudu satu i waluay nu bulad ira ku sepat nu reimad , ira tu ku tayniyay nu maka Taypakay, maka Ilannay, maka Taycuay, makaTaynanay a mipadang tu sapipatuyaw tura hitay nu Pangcah. Ira Tapang nu Pusungay ci 朝倉菊三郎 ku mikeriday namaka timul dungdungsa a taamis, ruma satu mikatimul besuc sa a tayra i Kinpuka a miletaes tira hitay nu Pangcah ta caay pakademec laliw satu. I waluay nu bulad ira ku cacay a remiad tangasa tu kira hitay i Madawdaw, awaay tu kira tamdaw nu Pangcah itila. Tutiya tu a remiad maletaes tu atu Turik a niyaru', a caay pakademec papilimekan tu kira wawawawa atu patu'asay atu babahi i terung nu lutuk, tuna mahaen milaliwmilaliw tu heni tu ka'uripan a Katomayan. Marariwasak tu kira i waliay a Pangcapangcahan, i waluay nu bulad ira ku muketep a remiad, mitanumu tu Tumuk nu balangaw ci Kulas·mahenghengan, a mieping tina demakan, maanen naca matuas tu ku miheca nira tumuk mudeku tu i tatakel, u lihalaw haw tu pihaceng nu demak, papitamurungen tu kapah a tayra tiya tumukan nu Tulik atu Madawdaw tiya balah han kira nikapet nu kuwang a maherek kira sepatay a pulu'ira ku walu a nikakakuwang. Tuherek ninademak caay kapihaceng ku nipisaybang nira Ripung, miaray aca ci Kulas·Mahenghengan a pakawlah, tunamahaen pabalucu'ay tu sapiletaes tu Taluku, matalaw a malecapu ku Pangcah atu Taluku a miletaes tu henian, sisa caay kabaeket ku saybang, alaw han a cacay ku kuwang nu Pangcah ira palalanay a tumuk nu Madawdaw ci Lekal, tumuk nu Tulik ci Asan, sipacait i aayaw ni lalubangan nu heni a pamelaw tu nipiputun tu awul, napakakudul a mahetik pihaceng ku duka tiya pauli hantu ku heni a palaliw.
S.PHON: o~u~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw o~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw maɾəsito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. na niko~u~uwanto~u~u i karipo~u~unan ko~u~u sawaɾijan no~u~u tajwan, maməɾaw no~u~u ħəni kira paŋʦaħ ato~u~u ro~u~uma a pajnijaro~u~uʡan, saɬ~ɮiħəmaj saan ʦaaj kariaŋ, sisa pakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan to~u~u piħaʦəŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, matija misaɾaɾaniʡ, misakajakaj, misatimo~u~u, misapo~u~uŋkaŋ, misaminato~u~u, mikiɾaŋ, mib~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ, misaɾo~u~uma* aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sasaŋaʡan, awaaj ko~u~u paħərəkan. matija i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, maħərək kira rarajaaj a ɾaɾan, namaka po~u~ujo~u~uma taŋasaj ko~u~uɬ~ɮiʦ no~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ, makaɾat to~u~u pito~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u siwa ko~u~u nikararaja nisaŋaʡ tira ɾaɾan. i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, maɾiŋto~u~u a misaŋa to~u~u ɾaɾan no~u~u siɾamaɾaj taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan tija maħərək. na makara i minato~u~u no~u~u nab~b~vako~u~uwan taŋasa i po~u~ujo~u~uma no~u~u po~u~uso~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮəŋajaj a kajraan no~u~u siɾamaɾaj a ɾaɾaɾaɾanan. to~u~una maħaən sao~u~upo~u~u ħan to~u~u nira ripo~u~un ko~u~u kapaħ amin a papisikak, araw mab~b~vo~u~urib~b~vo~u~ur to~u~u waʦa ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, miʦiɬ~ɮək ko~u~u wajwaj, saʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaj ħank o~u~u nijaro~u~u a papito~u~upin to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u ħəni a taɾaʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwa, aɬ~ɮiħajaɬ~ɮiħaj to~u~u ko~u~u ʦiŋəɾawaj, ʦaajaj pakaɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak nira ripo~u~un, ħaən sato~u~u a maɾaɾais i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, ta masaɬ~ɮak ko~u~u saajawaj no~u~u ɾaʡis no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ. i karipo~u~unan no~u~u **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, i sakato~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u~u to~u~usa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u ɾima a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u~u niɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ no~u~u kanto~u~u no~u~u ripo~u~un to~u~u "ɾima a miħəʦa to~u~u sapiɾəsimət to~u~u b~b~vansiŋ"sanaj a ɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ, to~u~u sapiəpiŋ to~u~u itiniaj a jinʦo~u~umin pataħəkaɾ sato~u~u mamikisa to~u~u ɾaɾaɾaɾanan, taŋasa sa i ɾimaaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u~u sab~b~vaw ənəm,ɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ sat o~u~u sakaj o~u~umaħ,maħaən to~u~u sapiaɾaw to~u~u səra no~u~u jinʦo~u~umin, a mipəkpək to~u~u sapitəŋiɾaw to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ripo~u~un. taŋasa i **** no~u~u miħəʦa i ɾimaaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, i ħərək a paɾipiɬ~ɮa kira ripo~u~un, masaso~u~uwaɾ to~u~u kira to~u~umo~u~uk amin a maɾəʦapo~u~u i pisirian a masaso~u~uwaɾ a miɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ to~u~u sapib~b~vəɾiħaw tira ripo~u~unan, ato~u~u nikəɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ɾipiɬ~ɮa, nirawaʦo~u~u ato~u~u niaɾaw to~u~u ko~u~uwako~u~uwaŋ, maħaən ko~u~u riŋəs ato~u~u sakaŋaɾajaw a mib~b~vaħb~b~vaħ to~u~u ripo~u~un. so~u~uɾinaj i tijato~u~u no~u~u miħəʦaan ħərək no~u~u ɾisin, ʦaaj jamin piʦo~u~uɾo~u~u to~u~u nitipo~u~us a patəɾi i so~u~uko~u~u nira ripo~u~un, araw kab~b~vanaʡan, b~b~vəɾo~u~ut sato~u~u kira sakakaaj a miro~u~ujaro~u~uj a tajra i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u~u to~u~uɾik a parəmiaɬ~ɮ a papiʦo~u~uɾo~u~uʡ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u papaso~u~uwaɾən nira ripo~u~un ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ a misasaʡa miħərək tinaɬ~ɮəmakan, ta ʦaaj to~u~u piɾiʦɾiʦ kira ripo~u~un. i tija:to~u~u a miħəʦaan to~u~u pito~u~uaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u~u to~u~usa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u səpat, ira ko~u~u kinʦaɾ no~u~u to~u~uɾik ʦi ***** paɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ a miʦiħi a miɾiʦɾiʦ tira ni saŋaan a ɾaɾan, araw maʦaʦiħi ato~u~u to~u~umo~u~un no~u~u to~u~uɾiʦ ʦirao~uro~un, makaməɾaw kira sakakaaj a to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u to~u~uɾik araw b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ sato~u~u amin kira to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡa mipəkpək ta mapataj kira kinʦaɾ a siɬ~ɮəmak tira "ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw ħanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak". makatəŋiɾ kira to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, kəriɬ~ɮ sato~u~u to~u~u b~b~vinawɾan a miʦaɾap to~u~u tajritajriŋan ato~u~u ʦaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, paʦo~u~uk ħan kira kinʦaɾ ato~u~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj. to~u~uwa pasao~u~upo~u~u ħan nira ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, ʦiraro~u~uko~u~uħaj, kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, to~u~urik, pao~u~uŋʔo~u~uŋ, makaɾa to~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a patəkənan no~u~u kapaħ a miko~u~uko~u~uŋ tira kaɾəʦapo~u~uan ato~u~u ɾaɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋan, araw maɾaɾitəmo~u~uħ i kanapo~u~uka atija kinʦaɾ no~u~u ripo~u~un a maɾətaəs, mapataj kija tato~u~usaaj a kinʦaɾ, maɬ~ɮo~u~uka ko~u~u maɬ~ɮo~u~ukaaj, makaməɾaw kija i amisaj a kinʦaɾ b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ ħan kira paŋʦaħ miɾaɾiw, to~u~una maħaən papaja sato~u~u a miʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u ripo~u~un a mitakaw amipəʦi to~u~u maamaan to~u~u sapiəɬ~ɮis tira ripo~u~unan. miɾaɾiwmiɾaɾiw to~u~u ko~u~uħəni i kinapo~u~uka. i saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v no~u~u ənəmaj ko~u~u to~u~uki, makatəŋiɾ to~u~u kira i b~b~vab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮaj a kinʦaɾ po~u~uto~u~un ħan ko~u~u makaamisaj a sakasaso~u~uwaɾ a təɾaj, maɾətəp ħənaʦa ko~u~u ɾəɾəsian no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma, mapo~u~uto~u~un ko~u~u ɾaɾan, sab~b~vaw ənəm to~u~u kira kinʦaɾ o~u~u mamikinsa a tajra i b~b~vab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ, itəro~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾaɾan maɾitəmo~u~uħ no~u~u ħəni kira ʦaajaj katatano~u~u kinʦaɾ ato~u~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a mapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡa mito~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u tajraaja tamɬ~ɮaw. i to~u~uja to~u~usaaj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, maao~u~uno~u~unto~u~u a paɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u ħitaj kira ripo~u~un, to~u~u sakaʦaaj to~u~u pakaʦo~u~umo~u~ut kira paŋʦaħ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u səpat no~u~u rəimaɬ~ɮ , ira to~u~u ko~u~u tajnijaj no~u~u maka tajpakaj, maka iɾannaj, maka tajʦo~u~uaj, makatajnanaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u~u sapipato~u~ujaw to~u~ura ħitaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ. ira tapaŋ no~u~u po~u~uso~u~uŋaj ʦi ***** ko~u~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj namaka timo~u~uɾ ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋsa a taamis, ro~u~uma sato~u~u mikatimo~u~uɾ b~b~vəso~u~uʦ sa a tajra i kinpo~u~uka a miɾətaəs tira ħitaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ ta ʦaaj pakaɬ~ɮəməʦ ɾaɾiw sato~u~u. i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u ʦaʦaj a rəmiaɬ~ɮ taŋasa to~u~u kira ħitaj i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, awaaj to~u~u kira tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u paŋʦaħ itiɾa. to~u~utija to~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ maɾətaəs to~u~u ato~u~u to~u~urik a nijaro~u~uʡ, a ʦaaj pakaɬ~ɮəməʦ papiɾiməkan to~u~u kira wawawawa ato~u~u pato~u~uʡasaj ato~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i təro~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk, to~u~una maħaən miɾaɾiwmiɾaɾiw to~u~u ħəni to~u~u kaʡo~u~uripan a kato~umajan. marariwasak to~u~u kira i waɾiaj a paŋʦapaŋʦaħan, i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u mo~u~ukətəp a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, mitano~u~umo~u~u to~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u b~b~vaɾaŋaw ʦi ko~u~uɾas*maħəŋħəŋan, a miəpiŋ tina ɬ~ɮəmakan, maanən naʦa mato~u~uas to~u~u ko~u~u miħəʦa nira to~u~umo~u~uk mo~u~uɬ~ɮəko~u~u to~u~u i tatakəɾ, o~u~u ɾiħaɾaw ħaw to~u~u piħaʦəŋ no~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak, papitamo~u~uro~u~uŋən to~u~u kapaħ a tajra tija to~u~umo~u~ukan no~u~u to~u~uɾik ato~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw tija b~b~vaɾaħ ħan kira nikapət no~u~u ko~u~uwaŋ a maħərək kira səpataj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u a nikakako~u~uwaŋ. to~u~uħərək ninaɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj kapiħaʦəŋ ko~u~u nipisajb~b~vaŋ nira ripo~u~uŋ, miaraj aʦa ʦi ko~u~uɾas*maħəŋħəŋan a pakawɾaħ, to~u~unamaħaən pab~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj to~u~u sapiɾətaəs to~u~u taɾo~u~uko~u~u, mataɾaw a maɾəʦapo~u~u ko~u~u paŋʦaħ ato~u~u taɾo~u~uko~u~u a miɾətaəs to~u~u ħənian, sisa ʦaaj kab~b~vaəkət ko~u~u sajb~b~vaŋ, aɾaw ħan a ʦaʦaj ko~u~u ko~u~uwaŋ no~u~u paŋʦaħ ira paɾaɾanaj a to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾəkaɾ, to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u to~u~uɾik ʦi asan, sipaʦait i aajaw ni ɾaɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋan no~u~u ħəni a paməɾaw to~u~u nipipo~u~uto~u~un to~u~u awo~u~uɾ, napakako~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ a maħətik piħaʦəŋ ko~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uka tija pao~u~uɾi ħanto~u~u ko~u~u ħəni a paɾaɾiw.
S.FORM: U micidekay a demak nu Cengkuwangaw U demak nu Cengkuwangaw malesitudung tu Madawdaw. Na nikuwantu i kaRipunan ku sawaliyan nu Taywan, mamelaw nu heni kira Pangcah atu ruma a payniyaru'an, sadihemay saan caay kariang, sisa pakadademakan tu pihacengay a demakan, matiya misalalani', misakayakay, misatimu, misapungkang, misaminatu, mikilang, mibekeluh, misaluma… adihay ku sasanga'an, awaay ku paherekan. Matiya i 1904 nu mihecaan, maherek kira rarayaay a lalan, namaka Puyuma tangasay Kudic nu Bakung, makalat tu pitu a pulu' ira ku siwa ku nikararaya nisanga' tira lalan. I 1909 nu mihecaan, malingtu a misanga tu lalan nu silamalay tangasa i 1911 a mihecaan tiya maherek. Na makara i minatu nu Nabakuwan tangasa i Puyuma nu Pusung atu dengayay a kayraan nu silamalay a lalalalanan. Tuna mahaen saupu han tu nira Ripun ku kapah amin a papisikak, araw maburibur tu waca ku 'urip nu niyaru', micidek ku wayway, sacudacuday hank u niyaru a papitupin tu tamdaw nu heni a talacuwacuwa, adihayadihay tu ku cingelaway, caayay pakadungdung tu demak nira Ripun, haen satu a malalais i 1908 nu mihecaan, ta masadak ku saayaway nu la'is nu Cikasuan i niyaru' nu Pangcah. I kaRipunan nu 1910 nu mihecaan, i sakatusa a bulad nu tusa a pulu'ira ku lima a remiad, ira ku nilubang nu kantu nu Ripun tu "lima a miheca tu sapilesimet tu bansing"sanay a lubang, tu sapieping tu itiniay a Yincumin patahekal satu mamikisa tu lalalalanan, tangasa sa i limaay a bulad tu sabaw enem,lubang sat u sakay umah,mahaen tu sapialaw tu sera nu Yincumin, a mipekpek tu sapitengilaw tu suwal nu Ripun. Tangasa i 1911 nu miheca i limaay a bulad, i herek a palipida kira Ripun, masasuwal tu kira tumuk amin a malecapu i Pisirian a masasuwal a milubang tu sapibelihaw tira Ripunan, atu nikelul tu lipida, nirawacu atu nialaw tu kuwakuwang, mahaen ku ringes atu sakangalayaw a mibahbah tu Ripun. Sulinay i tiyatu nu mihecaan herek nu lisin, caay yamin piculu tu nitipus a pateli i suku nira Ripun, araw kabana'an, belut satu kira sakakaay a miruyaruy a tayra i Madawdaw atu tulik a paremiad a papiculu', padudu satu papasuwalen nira Ripun ci Kolas Mahengheng a misasa'a miherek tinademakan, ta caay tu piliclic kira Ripun. I tiya:tu a mihecaan tu pituay a bulad nu tusa a pulu' ira ku sepat, ira ku kincal nu Tulik ci 福間彥四郎 palecapu tu tumuk nu niyaru' a micihi a miliclic tira ni sangaan a lalan, araw macacihi atu tumun nu Tulic ciRaoron, makamelaw kira sakakaay a tumuk nu Tulik araw belung satu amin kira tumuk nu niyaru'a mipekpek ta mapatay kira kincal a sidemak tira "Cengkuwangaw hanay a demak". Makatengil kira tumuk nu Madawdaw, kerid satu tu binawlan a micalap tu tayritayringan atu cacudadan, pacuk han kira kincal atu pasubana'ay. Tuwa pasaupu han nira ku niyaru' nu Madawdaw, Cirarukuhay, Kaheciday, Turik, Paung^ung, makala tu tuluay a patekenan nu kapah a mikukung tira kalecapuan atu lalubangan, araw malalitemuh i Kanapuka atiya kincal nu Ripun a maletaes, mapatay kiya tatusaay a kincal, maduka ku madukaay, makamelaw kiya i amisay a kincal belung han kira Pangcah milaliw, tuna mahaen papaya satu a micumud tu luma' nu Ripun a mitakaw amipeci tu maamaan tu sapiedis tira Ripunan. Milaliwmilaliw tu kuheni i Kinapuka. I sangsangdeb nu enemay ku tuki, makatengil tu kira i Babukuday a kincal putun han ku makaamisay a sakasasuwal a telay, maletep henaca ku lelesian nu Puyuma, maputun ku lalan, sabaw enem tu kira kincal u mamikinsa a tayra i Babukud, iterung nu lalan malitemuh nu heni kira caayay katatanu kincal atu pasubana'ay nu Madawdaw a mapasubana'a mitungal tu tayraaya tamdaw. I tuya tusaay a pulu'ira ku walu a remiad, maaununtu a palecapu tu hitay kira Ripun, tu sakacaay tu pakacumut kira Pangcah, padudu satu i waluay nu bulad ira ku sepat nu reimad , ira tu ku tayniyay nu maka Taypakay, maka Ilannay, maka Taycuay, makaTaynanay a mipadang tu sapipatuyaw tura hitay nu Pangcah. Ira Tapang nu Pusungay ci 朝倉菊三郎 ku mikeriday namaka timul dungdungsa a taamis, ruma satu mikatimul besuc sa a tayra i Kinpuka a miletaes tira hitay nu Pangcah ta caay pakademec laliw satu. I waluay nu bulad ira ku cacay a remiad tangasa tu kira hitay i Madawdaw, awaay tu kira tamdaw nu Pangcah itila. Tutiya tu a remiad maletaes tu atu Turik a niyaru', a caay pakademec papilimekan tu kira wawawawa atu patu'asay atu babahi i terung nu lutuk, tuna mahaen milaliwmilaliw tu heni tu ka'uripan a Katomayan. Marariwasak tu kira i waliay a Pangcapangcahan, i waluay nu bulad ira ku muketep a remiad, mitanumu tu Tumuk nu balangaw ci Kulas·mahenghengan, a mieping tina demakan, maanen naca matuas tu ku miheca nira tumuk mudeku tu i tatakel, u lihalaw haw tu pihaceng nu demak, papitamurungen tu kapah a tayra tiya tumukan nu Tulik atu Madawdaw tiya balah han kira nikapet nu kuwang a maherek kira sepatay a pulu'ira ku walu a nikakakuwang. Tuherek ninademak caay kapihaceng ku nipisaybang nira Ripung, miaray aca ci Kulas·Mahenghengan a pakawlah, tunamahaen pabalucu'ay tu sapiletaes tu Taluku, matalaw a malecapu ku Pangcah atu Taluku a miletaes tu henian, sisa caay kabaeket ku saybang, alaw han a cacay ku kuwang nu Pangcah ira palalanay a tumuk nu Madawdaw ci Lekal, tumuk nu Tulik ci Asan, sipacait i aayaw ni lalubangan nu heni a pamelaw tu nipiputun tu awul, napakakudul a mahetik pihaceng ku duka tiya pauli hantu ku heni a palaliw.
S.PHON: o~u~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw o~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw maɾəsito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. na niko~u~uwanto~u~u i karipo~u~unan ko~u~u sawaɾijan no~u~u tajwan, maməɾaw no~u~u ħəni kira paŋʦaħ ato~u~u ro~u~uma a pajnijaro~u~uʡan, saɬ~ɮiħəmaj saan ʦaaj kariaŋ, sisa pakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan to~u~u piħaʦəŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, matija misaɾaɾaniʡ, misakajakaj, misatimo~u~u, misapo~u~uŋkaŋ, misaminato~u~u, mikiɾaŋ, mib~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ, misaɾo~u~uma* aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sasaŋaʡan, awaaj ko~u~u paħərəkan. matija i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, maħərək kira rarajaaj a ɾaɾan, namaka po~u~ujo~u~uma taŋasaj ko~u~uɬ~ɮiʦ no~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ, makaɾat to~u~u pito~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u siwa ko~u~u nikararaja nisaŋaʡ tira ɾaɾan. i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, maɾiŋto~u~u a misaŋa to~u~u ɾaɾan no~u~u siɾamaɾaj taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan tija maħərək. na makara i minato~u~u no~u~u nab~b~vako~u~uwan taŋasa i po~u~ujo~u~uma no~u~u po~u~uso~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮəŋajaj a kajraan no~u~u siɾamaɾaj a ɾaɾaɾaɾanan. to~u~una maħaən sao~u~upo~u~u ħan to~u~u nira ripo~u~un ko~u~u kapaħ amin a papisikak, araw mab~b~vo~u~urib~b~vo~u~ur to~u~u waʦa ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, miʦiɬ~ɮək ko~u~u wajwaj, saʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaj ħank o~u~u nijaro~u~u a papito~u~upin to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u ħəni a taɾaʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwa, aɬ~ɮiħajaɬ~ɮiħaj to~u~u ko~u~u ʦiŋəɾawaj, ʦaajaj pakaɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak nira ripo~u~un, ħaən sato~u~u a maɾaɾais i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, ta masaɬ~ɮak ko~u~u saajawaj no~u~u ɾaʡis no~u~u ʦikaso~u~uan i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ. i karipo~u~unan no~u~u **** no~u~u miħəʦaan, i sakato~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u~u to~u~usa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u ɾima a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u~u niɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ no~u~u kanto~u~u no~u~u ripo~u~un to~u~u "ɾima a miħəʦa to~u~u sapiɾəsimət to~u~u b~b~vansiŋ"sanaj a ɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ, to~u~u sapiəpiŋ to~u~u itiniaj a jinʦo~u~umin pataħəkaɾ sato~u~u mamikisa to~u~u ɾaɾaɾaɾanan, taŋasa sa i ɾimaaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u~u sab~b~vaw ənəm,ɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ sat o~u~u sakaj o~u~umaħ,maħaən to~u~u sapiaɾaw to~u~u səra no~u~u jinʦo~u~umin, a mipəkpək to~u~u sapitəŋiɾaw to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ripo~u~un. taŋasa i **** no~u~u miħəʦa i ɾimaaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, i ħərək a paɾipiɬ~ɮa kira ripo~u~un, masaso~u~uwaɾ to~u~u kira to~u~umo~u~uk amin a maɾəʦapo~u~u i pisirian a masaso~u~uwaɾ a miɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋ to~u~u sapib~b~vəɾiħaw tira ripo~u~unan, ato~u~u nikəɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ɾipiɬ~ɮa, nirawaʦo~u~u ato~u~u niaɾaw to~u~u ko~u~uwako~u~uwaŋ, maħaən ko~u~u riŋəs ato~u~u sakaŋaɾajaw a mib~b~vaħb~b~vaħ to~u~u ripo~u~un. so~u~uɾinaj i tijato~u~u no~u~u miħəʦaan ħərək no~u~u ɾisin, ʦaaj jamin piʦo~u~uɾo~u~u to~u~u nitipo~u~us a patəɾi i so~u~uko~u~u nira ripo~u~un, araw kab~b~vanaʡan, b~b~vəɾo~u~ut sato~u~u kira sakakaaj a miro~u~ujaro~u~uj a tajra i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u~u to~u~uɾik a parəmiaɬ~ɮ a papiʦo~u~uɾo~u~uʡ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u papaso~u~uwaɾən nira ripo~u~un ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ a misasaʡa miħərək tinaɬ~ɮəmakan, ta ʦaaj to~u~u piɾiʦɾiʦ kira ripo~u~un. i tija:to~u~u a miħəʦaan to~u~u pito~u~uaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u~u to~u~usa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u səpat, ira ko~u~u kinʦaɾ no~u~u to~u~uɾik ʦi ***** paɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ a miʦiħi a miɾiʦɾiʦ tira ni saŋaan a ɾaɾan, araw maʦaʦiħi ato~u~u to~u~umo~u~un no~u~u to~u~uɾiʦ ʦirao~uro~un, makaməɾaw kira sakakaaj a to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u to~u~uɾik araw b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ sato~u~u amin kira to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡa mipəkpək ta mapataj kira kinʦaɾ a siɬ~ɮəmak tira "ʦəŋko~u~uwaŋaw ħanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak". makatəŋiɾ kira to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, kəriɬ~ɮ sato~u~u to~u~u b~b~vinawɾan a miʦaɾap to~u~u tajritajriŋan ato~u~u ʦaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, paʦo~u~uk ħan kira kinʦaɾ ato~u~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj. to~u~uwa pasao~u~upo~u~u ħan nira ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, ʦiraro~u~uko~u~uħaj, kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, to~u~urik, pao~u~uŋʔo~u~uŋ, makaɾa to~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a patəkənan no~u~u kapaħ a miko~u~uko~u~uŋ tira kaɾəʦapo~u~uan ato~u~u ɾaɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋan, araw maɾaɾitəmo~u~uħ i kanapo~u~uka atija kinʦaɾ no~u~u ripo~u~un a maɾətaəs, mapataj kija tato~u~usaaj a kinʦaɾ, maɬ~ɮo~u~uka ko~u~u maɬ~ɮo~u~ukaaj, makaməɾaw kija i amisaj a kinʦaɾ b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ ħan kira paŋʦaħ miɾaɾiw, to~u~una maħaən papaja sato~u~u a miʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u ripo~u~un a mitakaw amipəʦi to~u~u maamaan to~u~u sapiəɬ~ɮis tira ripo~u~unan. miɾaɾiwmiɾaɾiw to~u~u ko~u~uħəni i kinapo~u~uka. i saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v no~u~u ənəmaj ko~u~u to~u~uki, makatəŋiɾ to~u~u kira i b~b~vab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮaj a kinʦaɾ po~u~uto~u~un ħan ko~u~u makaamisaj a sakasaso~u~uwaɾ a təɾaj, maɾətəp ħənaʦa ko~u~u ɾəɾəsian no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma, mapo~u~uto~u~un ko~u~u ɾaɾan, sab~b~vaw ənəm to~u~u kira kinʦaɾ o~u~u mamikinsa a tajra i b~b~vab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ, itəro~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾaɾan maɾitəmo~u~uħ no~u~u ħəni kira ʦaajaj katatano~u~u kinʦaɾ ato~u~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a mapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡa mito~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u tajraaja tamɬ~ɮaw. i to~u~uja to~u~usaaj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, maao~u~uno~u~unto~u~u a paɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u ħitaj kira ripo~u~un, to~u~u sakaʦaaj to~u~u pakaʦo~u~umo~u~ut kira paŋʦaħ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u səpat no~u~u rəimaɬ~ɮ , ira to~u~u ko~u~u tajnijaj no~u~u maka tajpakaj, maka iɾannaj, maka tajʦo~u~uaj, makatajnanaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u~u sapipato~u~ujaw to~u~ura ħitaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ. ira tapaŋ no~u~u po~u~uso~u~uŋaj ʦi ***** ko~u~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj namaka timo~u~uɾ ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋsa a taamis, ro~u~uma sato~u~u mikatimo~u~uɾ b~b~vəso~u~uʦ sa a tajra i kinpo~u~uka a miɾətaəs tira ħitaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ ta ʦaaj pakaɬ~ɮəməʦ ɾaɾiw sato~u~u. i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u ʦaʦaj a rəmiaɬ~ɮ taŋasa to~u~u kira ħitaj i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, awaaj to~u~u kira tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u paŋʦaħ itiɾa. to~u~utija to~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ maɾətaəs to~u~u ato~u~u to~u~urik a nijaro~u~uʡ, a ʦaaj pakaɬ~ɮəməʦ papiɾiməkan to~u~u kira wawawawa ato~u~u pato~u~uʡasaj ato~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i təro~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk, to~u~una maħaən miɾaɾiwmiɾaɾiw to~u~u ħəni to~u~u kaʡo~u~uripan a kato~umajan. marariwasak to~u~u kira i waɾiaj a paŋʦapaŋʦaħan, i waɾo~u~uaj no~u~u b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u mo~u~ukətəp a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, mitano~u~umo~u~u to~u~u to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u b~b~vaɾaŋaw ʦi ko~u~uɾas*maħəŋħəŋan, a miəpiŋ tina ɬ~ɮəmakan, maanən naʦa mato~u~uas to~u~u ko~u~u miħəʦa nira to~u~umo~u~uk mo~u~uɬ~ɮəko~u~u to~u~u i tatakəɾ, o~u~u ɾiħaɾaw ħaw to~u~u piħaʦəŋ no~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak, papitamo~u~uro~u~uŋən to~u~u kapaħ a tajra tija to~u~umo~u~ukan no~u~u to~u~uɾik ato~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw tija b~b~vaɾaħ ħan kira nikapət no~u~u ko~u~uwaŋ a maħərək kira səpataj a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u a nikakako~u~uwaŋ. to~u~uħərək ninaɬ~ɮəmak ʦaaj kapiħaʦəŋ ko~u~u nipisajb~b~vaŋ nira ripo~u~uŋ, miaraj aʦa ʦi ko~u~uɾas*maħəŋħəŋan a pakawɾaħ, to~u~unamaħaən pab~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj to~u~u sapiɾətaəs to~u~u taɾo~u~uko~u~u, mataɾaw a maɾəʦapo~u~u ko~u~u paŋʦaħ ato~u~u taɾo~u~uko~u~u a miɾətaəs to~u~u ħənian, sisa ʦaaj kab~b~vaəkət ko~u~u sajb~b~vaŋ, aɾaw ħan a ʦaʦaj ko~u~u ko~u~uwaŋ no~u~u paŋʦaħ ira paɾaɾanaj a to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾəkaɾ, to~u~umo~u~uk no~u~u to~u~uɾik ʦi asan, sipaʦait i aajaw ni ɾaɾo~u~ub~b~vaŋan no~u~u ħəni a paməɾaw to~u~u nipipo~u~uto~u~un to~u~u awo~u~uɾ, napakako~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ a maħətik piħaʦəŋ ko~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uka tija pao~u~uɾi ħanto~u~u ko~u~u ħəni a paɾaɾiw.
